text: Hello. Hello. I'm screening calls. May I ask you with calling and the reason for your call? Hey, good morning. James here from Nova Health Care, Texas. I'm calling to let you know about a cashback benefit that may help with out-of-pocket expenses of up to $10,000, especially during a hospital stay. So to check whether you are eligible for this, may I know your age, please? Thanks. Connecting you for now. If you can give me just a moment, there's no obligation to buy anything right now. Can you just hear me out for a minute, please? Yeah, I understand that you're busy, but I just need a moment of your time.
